---
title: "weedseedmort"
author: "maya hofmann"
date: "2026-06-18"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#load libraries 
library(rcartocolor)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
library(DImodels)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(nlme)
library(car)
library(performance)
library(multcomp)
library(multcompView)
library(ggeffects)
library(emmeans)
library(MuMIn)
library(FSA)
library(glmmTMB)
library(DHARMa)
library(modelsummary)
library(Ternary)
library(vegan)
#setwd("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort)
```

Import the data: year 1 CCC (2022-2023), year 2 CCC (2023-2024), COMPFUNC
```{r}
seed_mort_y1 <- read.csv("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/ccc_seed_mortality_22_23.csv")
seed_mort_y2 <- read.csv("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/ccc_seed_mortality_23_24.csv")
winter_year2_plot <- read.csv("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/compfunc_winter_y2_plot.csv") #this is already grouped by plot since we did not have two subsamples (only one bag buried per plot)
```

Add necessary data columns and change necessary data to factors 
```{r}
#change to factors
#year `1
seed_mort_y1$block = as.factor(seed_mort_y1$block)
seed_mort_y1$time_yr = as.factor(seed_mort_y1$time_yr)
seed_mort_y1$season = as.factor(seed_mort_y1$season)
seed_mort_y1$trt = as.factor(seed_mort_y1$trt)
seed_mort_y1$subsample = as.factor(seed_mort_y1$subsample)
#year 2
seed_mort_y2$block = as.factor(seed_mort_y2$block)
seed_mort_y2$time_yr = as.factor(seed_mort_y2$time_yr)
seed_mort_y2$season = as.factor(seed_mort_y2$season)
seed_mort_y2$trt = as.factor(seed_mort_y2$trt)
seed_mort_y2$subsample = as.factor(seed_mort_y2$subsample)

#add proportion of total biomass for each species 
#year 1
seed_mort_y1$p_tri <- seed_mort_y1$trit_biomass_g / seed_mort_y1$cc_shoot_biomass_g
seed_mort_y1$p_clov <- seed_mort_y1$clov_biomass_g / seed_mort_y1$cc_shoot_biomass_g
seed_mort_y1$p_pea <- seed_mort_y1$pea_biomass_g / seed_mort_y1$cc_shoot_biomass_g
seed_mort_y1$p_can <- seed_mort_y1$can_biomass_g / seed_mort_y1$cc_shoot_biomass_g
#year 2
seed_mort_y2$p_tri <- seed_mort_y2$trit_biomass_g / seed_mort_y2$cc_shoot_biomass_g
seed_mort_y2$p_clov <- seed_mort_y2$clov_biomass_g / seed_mort_y2$cc_shoot_biomass_g
seed_mort_y2$p_pea <- seed_mort_y2$pea_biomass_g / seed_mort_y2$cc_shoot_biomass_g
seed_mort_y2$p_can <- seed_mort_y2$can_biomass_g / seed_mort_y2$cc_shoot_biomass_g

#compfunc 
winter_year2_plot <- subset(winter_year2_plot,!is.na(weed_seed_mortality))
winter_year2_plot$plot <- as.factor(winter_year2_plot$plot)
winter_year2_plot$block <- as.factor(winter_year2_plot$block)
winter_year2_plot$num_spp <- as.factor(winter_year2_plot$num_spp)
winter_year2_plot$canola_presence <- as.factor(winter_year2_plot$canola_presence)

#add proportion in stand for each spp
winter_year2_plot$p_tri_stand <- winter_year2_plot$tri_stand_m2 / (winter_year2_plot$tri_stand_m2 + winter_year2_plot$can_stand_m2 + winter_year2_plot$clov_stand_m2)
winter_year2_plot$p_can_stand <- winter_year2_plot$can_stand_m2 / (winter_year2_plot$tri_stand_m2 + winter_year2_plot$can_stand_m2 + winter_year2_plot$clov_stand_m2)
winter_year2_plot$p_clov_stand <- winter_year2_plot$clov_stand_m2 / (winter_year2_plot$tri_stand_m2 + winter_year2_plot$can_stand_m2 + winter_year2_plot$clov_stand_m2)

```

Average subsamples of the data 
```{r}
#year 1
seed_mort_y1_plot <- seed_mort_y1 %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(plot, trt, season, time_yr, block) %>% #everything besides subsample 
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE), #calculating mean of all numeric columns
            amapo_mortality_se = se(amapo_mortality), #adding standard error columns for amapo and setfa mortality
            setfa_mortality_se = se(setfa_mortality)) 

#year 2
seed_mort_y2_plot <- seed_mort_y2 %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(plot, trt, season, time_yr, block) %>% #everything besides subsample 
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE), #calculating mean of all numeric columns
            amapo_mortality_se = se(amapo_mortality), #adding standard error columns for amapo and setfa mortality
            setfa_mortality_se = se(setfa_mortality)) 
```

Separate each year of data into respective seasons
```{r}
#year 1
seed_mort_y1_f22 <- subset(seed_mort_y1_plot, season == "F22")
seed_mort_y1_s23 <- subset(seed_mort_y1_plot, season == "S23")
seed_mort_y1_f23 <- subset(seed_mort_y1_plot, season == "F23")
#year 2
seed_mort_y2_f23 <- subset(seed_mort_y2_plot, season == "F23")
seed_mort_y2_s24 <- subset(seed_mort_y2_plot, season == "S24")
seed_mort_y2_f24 <- subset(seed_mort_y2_plot, season == "F24")

#add necessary variables to necessary data frames 
#year one
seed_mort_y1_f23$cc_shoot_biomass_g_s23 <- seed_mort_y1_s23$cc_shoot_biomass_g
seed_mort_y1_f23$cc_root_biomass_g_s23 <- seed_mort_y1_s23$cc_root_g_total
seed_mort_y1_f23$cc_root_0_20_g_s23 <- seed_mort_y1_s23$cc_root_0_20_g   
seed_mort_y1_f23$cc_root_20_40_g_s23 <- seed_mort_y1_s23$cc_root_20_40_g
seed_mort_y1_f23$p_pea = seed_mort_y1_s23$p_pea
seed_mort_y1_f23$p_clov = seed_mort_y1_s23$p_clov
seed_mort_y1_f23$p_can = seed_mort_y1_s23$p_can
seed_mort_y1_f23$p_tri = seed_mort_y1_s23$p_tri
#year two 
seed_mort_y2_f24$p_pea = seed_mort_y2_s24$p_pea
seed_mort_y2_f24$p_clov = seed_mort_y2_s24$p_clov
seed_mort_y2_f24$p_can = seed_mort_y2_s24$p_can
seed_mort_y2_f24$p_tri = seed_mort_y2_s24$p_tri
seed_mort_y2_f24$cc_biomass_spring <- seed_mort_y2_s24$cc_shoot_biomass_g_m2
```

Make spring data from both yeras into a dataframe 
```{r}
seed_mort_spring <- bind_rows(seed_mort_y1_s23, seed_mort_y2_s24)
```

Plots of mortality by treatment for each season
```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
#year one spring amapo
amapos23_plot <- ggplot(seed_mort_y1_s23, aes(x=trt, y=(amapo_mortality), fill=trt))+
  geom_boxplot(color="black", show.legend = FALSE)+
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Fallow", "Pea", "Clover", "Canola", "Triticale", "3sppN", "4spp"))+
  ylim(0,1)+
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom = "point", shape=18, size=2.5, show.legend = FALSE)+
  labs(x="", y="A.powellii Mortality")+
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "Vivid") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=20, angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1), axis.title.x = element_text(size=24),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=20), axis.title.y=element_text(size=24), title = element_text(size=24))

#year one spring setfa
setfas23_plot <- ggplot(seed_mort_y1_s23, aes(x=trt, y=(setfa_mortality), fill=trt))+
  geom_boxplot(color="black", show.legend = FALSE)+
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Fallow", "Pea", "Clover", "Canola", "Triticale", "3sppN", "4spp"))+
  ylim(0,1)+
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom = "point", shape=18, size=2.5, show.legend = FALSE)+
  labs(x="", y="S. faberi Mortality")+
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "Vivid") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=20, angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1), axis.title.x = element_text(size=24),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=20), axis.title.y=element_text(size=24), title = element_text(size=24))

#year one fall amapo
amapof23_plot <- ggplot(seed_mort_y1_f23, aes(x=trt, y=(amapo_mortality), fill=trt))+
  geom_boxplot(color="black", show.legend = FALSE)+
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Fallow", "Pea", "Clover", "Canola", "Triticale", "3sppN", "4spp"))+
  ylim(0,1)+
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom = "point", shape=18, size=2.5, show.legend = FALSE)+
  labs(x="", y="A.powellii Mortality")+
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "Vivid") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=20, angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1), axis.title.x = element_text(size=24),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=20), axis.title.y=element_text(size=24), title = element_text(size=24))

#year one fall setfa 
setfaf23_plot <- ggplot(seed_mort_y1_f23, aes(x=trt, y=(setfa_mortality), fill=trt))+
  geom_boxplot(color="black", show.legend = FALSE)+
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Fallow", "Pea", "Clover", "Canola", "Triticale", "3sppN", "4spp"))+
  ylim(0,1)+
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom = "point", shape=18, size=2.5, show.legend = FALSE)+
  labs(x="", y="S. faberi Mortality")+
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "Vivid") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=20, angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1), axis.title.x = element_text(size=24),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=20), axis.title.y=element_text(size=24), title = element_text(size=24))

#year 2 spring amapo 
amapos24_plot<-ggplot(seed_mort_y2_s24, aes(x=trt, y=(amapo_mortality), fill=trt))+
  geom_boxplot(color="black", show.legend = FALSE)+
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Fallow", "Pea", "Clover", "Canola", "Triticale", "3sppN", "4spp"))+
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom = "point", shape=18, size=2.5, show.legend = FALSE)+
  ylim(0,1) +
  labs(x="", y="A.powellii Mortality")+
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "Vivid") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=20, angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1), axis.title.x = element_text(size=24),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=20), axis.title.y=element_text(size=24), title = element_text(size=24))

#year two spring setfa
setfas24_plot<-ggplot(seed_mort_y2_s24, aes(x=trt, y=(setfa_mortality), fill=trt))+
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Fallow", "Pea", "Clover", "Canola", "Triticale", "3sppN", "4spp"))+
  geom_boxplot(color="black", show.legend = FALSE)+
  ylim(0,1)+
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom = "point", shape=18, size=2.5, show.legend = FALSE)+
  labs(x="", y="S. faberi Mortality")+
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "Vivid") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=20, angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1), axis.title.x = element_text(size=24),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=20), axis.title.y=element_text(size=24), title = element_text(size=24))

#year 2 fall amapo
amapof24_plot<-ggplot(seed_mort_y2_f24, aes(x=trt, y=(amapo_mortality), fill=trt))+
  geom_boxplot(color="black", show.legend = FALSE)+
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Fallow", "Pea", "Clover", "Canola", "Triticale", "3sppN", "4spp"))+
  ylim(0,1)+
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom = "point", shape=18, size=2.5, show.legend = FALSE)+
  labs(x="", y="A.powellii Mortality")+
 scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "Vivid") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=20, angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1), axis.title.x = element_text(size=24),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=20), axis.title.y=element_text(size=24), title = element_text(size=24))

#year 2 fall setfa
setfaf24_plot<-ggplot(seed_mort_y2_f24, aes(x=trt, y=(setfa_mortality), fill=trt))+
  geom_boxplot(color="black", show.legend = FALSE)+
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Fallow", "Pea", "Clover", "Canola", "Triticale", "3sppN", "4spp"))+
  ylim(0,1)+
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom = "point", shape=18, size=2.5, show.legend = FALSE)+
  labs(x="", y="S. faberi Mortality")+
  scale_fill_carto_d(palette = "Vivid") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=20, angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1), axis.title.x = element_text(size=24),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=20), axis.title.y=element_text(size=24), title = element_text(size=24))

ggsave("amapo_s23.png", plot = amapos23_plot, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",)
ggsave("amapo_s24.png", plot = amapos24_plot, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",)
ggsave("amapo_f23.png", plot = amapof23_plot, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",)
ggsave("amapo_f24.png", plot = amapof24_plot, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",)

ggsave("setfa_s23.png", plot = setfas23_plot, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",)
ggsave("setfa_s24.png", plot = setfas24_plot, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",)
ggsave("setfa_f23.png", plot = setfaf23_plot, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",)
ggsave("setfa_f24.png", plot = setfaf24_plot, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",)
```
Ternary plot for weed seed mortality across cover crop mixture stands
```{r}
winter_year2_plot_nf <- winter_year2_plot[winter_year2_plot$treatment!=17,] #takes out fallow data
a <- winter_year2_plot_nf$p_tri_stand
b <- winter_year2_plot_nf$p_can_stand
c <- winter_year2_plot_nf$p_clov_stand
abc <- rbind(a, b, c)
weed_seed_mort <- winter_year2_plot_nf$weed_seed_mortality
par(mar = rep(0.2, 4))
TernaryPlot(alab = "triticale % in stand", blab = "canola % in stand", clab = "clover % in stand")
xy <- TernaryToXY(abc)
Predict <- function(predXY) {
  Distance <- function(a, b) {
    apply(a, 2, function(pt) sqrt(colSums((pt - b) ^ 2)))
  }
  dists <- Distance(xy, predXY)
  id <- 1 / dists
  idw <- id / rowSums(id)
  
  # Return:
  colSums(weed_seed_mort * t(idw))
}

#predict at triangle centres
tri <- TriangleCentres(resolution = 10L) #can adjust resolution

# Now we interpolate between our known values to generate a colour for each
# of our tiles
predicted <- Predict(tri[1:2, ])
map <- rbind(x = tri["x", ], y = tri["y", ], z = predicted,
             down = tri["triDown", ])

# Place a semitransparent colour fill over grid lines:
ColourTernary(map)
PlotTools::SpectrumLegend(
  "topright",
  cex = 0.8, # Font size
  palette = hcl.colors(265, palette = "viridis", alpha = 0.6),
  legend = paste(
    seq(from = max(winter_year2_plot_nf$weed_seed_mortality), to = min(winter_year2_plot_nf$weed_seed_mortality),
        length.out = 5)
  ),
  bty = "n", # No framing box
  xpd = NA, # Don't clip at margins
  title = "S. faberi seed mortality"
)
TernaryPoints(abc, col = 'black', pch = 16, cex = 1)
```

Models including treatment and cover crop biomass / proportion of biomass
```{r}
#year one spring: DOES TREATMENT AFFECT SEED MORTALITY?
amapo_s23_trt <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ trt + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s23_trt, type = "III")
#no significance

setfa_s23_trt <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ trt + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s23_trt, type = "III")
#treatment significant 

setfa_s23_emmeans <- emmeans(setfa_s23_trt, ~ trt, type="response")
pairs(setfa_s23_emmeans, adjust="Tukey") #Canola and Fallow significantly different
setfa_s23_cld <- cld(setfa_s23_emmeans, alpha=0.05, adjust="Tukey", Letter=letters) #canola a, fallow b, everything else ab
#tukey changed to sidak

setfa_s23_cld #canola and fallow significantly different 

#year one fall
amapo_f23_trt <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ trt + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f23_trt, type = "III")

setfa_f23_trt <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ trt + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f23_trt, type = "III")
#treatment significant
setfa_f23_emmeans <- emmeans(setfa_f23_trt, ~ trt, type="response")
pairs(setfa_f23_emmeans, adjust="Tukey") #Canola and Clover significantly different
setfa_f23_cld <- cld(setfa_f23_emmeans, alpha=0.05, adjust="Tukey", Letter=letters) #canola = a, clover = b, everything else ab
setfa_f23_cld #canola and clover significantly different 

#year two spring: DOES TREATMENT AFFECT SEED MORTALITY?
amapo_s24_trt <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ trt + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s24_trt, type = "III")
#not significant
setfa_s24_trt <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ trt + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s24_trt, type = "III")
#not significant 

#year two fall: DOES TREATMENT AFFECT SEED MORTALITY?
amapo_f24_trt <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ trt + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f24_trt, type = "III")

setfa_f24_trt <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ trt + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f24_trt, type = "III")

```

Model of spring mortality by year * treatment 
```{r}
amapo_year_m <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ trt*season + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_year_m, type = "III")
#not significant 
setfa_year_m <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ trt*season + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_year_m, type = "III")
#interaction significant
setfa_sp_emmeans <- emmeans(setfa_year_m, ~ trt*season, type="response")
pairs(setfa_sp_emmeans, adjust="Tukey")
setfa_sp_cld <- cld(setfa_sp_emmeans, alpha=0.05, adjust="Tukey", Letter=letters) 
setfa_sp_cld 
```

Models of mortality by season for each year 
```{r}
#taking out baseline data
seed_mort_y1_plot.n <- subset(seed_mort_y1_plot, time_yr != 0)
seed_mort_y2_plot.n <- subset(seed_mort_y2_plot, time_yr != 0)

#models year 1
amapo_myr <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ trt*time_yr + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_plot.n)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_myr, type = "III")
amapo_myr_emmeans <- emmeans(amapo_myr, ~ time_yr, type="response")
pairs(amapo_myr_emmeans, adjust="Tukey")
amapo_myr_cld <- cld(amapo_myr_emmeans, alpha=0.05, adjust="Tukey", Letter=letters)
amapo_myr_cld

setfa_myr <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ trt*time_yr + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_plot.n)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_myr, type = "III")
setfa_myr_emmeans <- emmeans(setfa_myr, ~ time_yr, type="response")
pairs(setfa_myr_emmeans, adjust="Tukey")
setfa_myr_cld <- cld(setfa_myr_emmeans, alpha=0.05, adjust="Tukey", Letter=letters)
setfa_myr_cld

#models year 2
amapo_mszn <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ trt*season + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_plot.n)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_mszn, type = "III")

setfa_mszn <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ trt*season + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_plot.n)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_mszn, type = "III")
setfa_mszn_emmeans <- emmeans(setfa_mszn, ~ season, type="response")
pairs(setfa_mszn_emmeans, adjust="Tukey")
setfa_mszn_cld <- cld(setfa_mszn_emmeans, alpha=0.05, adjust="Tukey", Letter=letters) 
setfa_mszn_cld #less mortality in fall than spring... interesting 
```

Models of seed mortality vs. total cover crop biomass 
```{r}
#spring year 1
amapo_s23_mbiomass <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ cc_shoot_biomass_g+ (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s23_mbiomass, type = "III")
setfa_s23_mbiomass <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ cc_shoot_biomass_g + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s23_mbiomass, type = "III")

#fall year 1
amapo_f23_mbiomass <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ cc_shoot_biomass_g_s23 + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f23_mbiomass, type = "III")
setfa_f23_mbiomass <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ cc_shoot_biomass_g_s23 + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f23_mbiomass, type = "III")

#spring year 2
amapo_s24_cc <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ cc_shoot_biomass_g_m2 + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s24_cc, type = "III")
#nothing significant here 
setfa_s24_cc <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ cc_shoot_biomass_g_m2, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s24_cc, type = "III")

#fall year 2
amapo_f24_cc <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ cc_biomass_spring, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f24_cc, type = "III")
#nothing significant here 
setfa_f24_cc <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ cc_biomass_spring, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f24_cc, type = "III")
summary(setfa_f24_cc)
#nothing significant here 

```
Models of weed seed mortality vs. each spp biomass
```{r}
#year one spring
setfa_s23_tritb <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ trit_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s23_tritb, type = "III") 

setfa_s23_clovb <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ clov_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s23_clovb, type = "III") 
#SIGNIFICANT

setfa_s23_canb <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ can_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s23_canb, type = "III") 
#almost significant 

setfa_s23_peab<- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ pea_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s23_peab, type = "III") 

amapo_s23_tritb <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ trit_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s23_tritb, type = "III") 

amapo_s23_clovb <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ clov_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s23_clovb, type = "III") 

amapo_s23_canb <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ can_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s23_canb, type = "III") 

amapo_s23_peab <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ pea_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s23_peab, type = "III") 

seed_mort_y1_f23$trit_biomass_g <- seed_mort_y1_s23$trit_biomass_g
seed_mort_y1_f23$can_biomass_g <- seed_mort_y1_s23$can_biomass_g
seed_mort_y1_f23$clov_biomass_g <- seed_mort_y1_s23$clov_biomass_g
seed_mort_y1_f23$pea_biomass_g <- seed_mort_y1_s23$pea_biomass_g
#year one fall
setfa_f23_tritb <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ trit_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f23_tritb, type = "III") 

setfa_f23_clovb <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ clov_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f23_clovb, type = "III") 
#SIGNIFICANT
setfa_f23_canb <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ can_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f23_canb, type = "III") 

setfa_f23_peab <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ pea_biomass_g,, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f23_peab, type = "III") 

amapo_f23_tritb <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ trit_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f23_tritb, type = "III") 

amapo_f23_clovb <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ clov_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f23_clovb, type = "III") 

amapo_f23_canb <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ can_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f23_canb, type = "III") 

amapo_f23_peab <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ pea_biomass_g, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f23_peab, type = "III") 

#compfunc (only canola biomass since everything else died)
mort_m1 <- glmmTMB(weed_seed_mortality ~ can_biomass_g_m2, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = winter_year2_plot)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(mort_m1, type = "III")
summary(mort_m1)

mort_m1b <- glmmTMB(weed_seed_mortality ~ can_biomass_g_m2 + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = winter_year2_plot)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(mort_m1, type = "III")
AICc(mort_m1, mort_m1b) #without block is a better model 
```

COMPFUNC graph (canola biomass vs. S. faberi mortality)
```{r}
setfa_s25_df<-as.data.frame(predict_response(mort_m1, terms = c("can_biomass_g_m2 [all]")))
setfa_s25_df<-setfa_s25_df %>% dplyr::rename(mort.pred =predicted)
setfa_s25_df<-setfa_s25_df %>% dplyr::rename(can_biomass_g_m2=x)
setfa_s25_df<-merge(setfa_s25_df, winter_year2_plot, by=c("can_biomass_g_m2"), all=TRUE)
ggplot(data = setfa_s25_df, aes(x = can_biomass_g_m2, y = weed_seed_mortality)) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  geom_line(setfa_s25_df, mapping=aes(x= can_biomass_g_m2, y= mort.pred), color="black", group = 1 ) +
  geom_ribbon(setfa_s25_df, mapping=aes(ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), alpha=.2, fill = "grey35")+
  geom_point() + 
  labs(x = "Canola biomass (g/m2)", 
       y = "S. faberi seed mortality") +
  theme_classic()
```

Models of weed seed mortality vs. each species biomass proportion
```{r}
#year one spring
setfa_s23_tritprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_tri, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s23_tritprop, type = "III") 

setfa_s23_clovprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_clov, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s23_clovprop, type = "III") 
#SIGNIFICANT

setfa_s23_canprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_can, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s23_canprop, type = "III") 
#almost significant 

setfa_s23_peaprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_pea, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s23_peaprop, type = "III") 

amapo_s23_tritprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_tri, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s23_tritprop, type = "III") 

amapo_s23_clovprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_clov, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s23_clovprop, type = "III") 

amapo_s23_canprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_can, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s23_canprop, type = "III") 

amapo_s23_peaprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_pea, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s23_peaprop, type = "III") 

#year one fall
setfa_f23_tritprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_tri, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f23_tritprop, type = "III") 

setfa_f23_clovprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_clov, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f23_clovprop, type = "III") 
#SIGNIFICANT

setfa_f23_canprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_can, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f23_canprop, type = "III") 

setfa_f23_peaprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_pea, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f23_peaprop, type = "III") 

amapo_f23_tritprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_tri, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f23_tritprop, type = "III") 

amapo_f23_clovprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_clov, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f23_clovprop, type = "III") 

amapo_f23_canprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_can, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f23_canprop, type = "III") 

amapo_f23_peaprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_pea, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f23_peaprop, type = "III") 

#year two spring
setfa_s24_tritprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_tri, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s24_tritprop, type = "III") 

setfa_s24_clovprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_clov, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s24_clovprop, type = "III") 

setfa_s24_canprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_can, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s24_canprop, type = "III") 

setfa_s24_peaprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_pea, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_s24_peaprop, type = "III") 

amapo_s24_tritprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_tri, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s24_tritprop, type = "III") 

amapo_s24_clovprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_clov, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s24_clovprop, type = "III") 

amapo_s24_canprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_can, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s24_canprop, type = "III") 

amapo_s24_peaprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_pea, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_s24_peaprop, type = "III") 

#year two fall
setfa_f24_tritprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_tri, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f24_tritprop, type = "III") 

setfa_f24_clovprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_clov, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f24_clovprop, type = "III") 

setfa_f24_canprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_can, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f24_canprop, type = "III") 

setfa_f24_peaprop <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ p_pea, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(setfa_f24_peaprop, type = "III") 

amapo_f24_tritprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_tri, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f24_tritprop, type = "III") 

amapo_f24_clovprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_clov, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f24_clovprop, type = "III") 

amapo_f24_canprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_can, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f24_canprop, type = "III") 

amapo_f24_peaprop <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ p_pea, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(amapo_f24_peaprop, type = "III") 
```

Adding environmental data to the dataframes 
```{r}
#adding fall GWC and N to spring data frames 
seed_mort_y1_s23$f22_gwc_9_29 <- seed_mort_y1_f22$f22_gwc_9_29
seed_mort_y1_s23$f22_n <- seed_mort_y1_f22$f22_n_mg_kg 
seed_mort_y2_s24$f23_gwc_10_3 <- seed_mort_y2_f23$f23_gwc_10_3
seed_mort_y2_s24$f23_n <- seed_mort_y2_f23$f23_mgN_kg

#calcuating AUCs for GWC and N, year one
s23_gwc_time <- c(0,25,50) #days of sampling
s23_gwc <- seed_mort_y1_s23[, c("s23_gwc_3_20", "s23_gwc_4_14", "s23_gwc_5_9")]
s23_gwc$auc <- with(s23_gwc,
               (25 - 0) * (s23_gwc_3_20 + s23_gwc_4_14) / 2 +
                 (50 - 25) * (s23_gwc_4_14 + s23_gwc_5_9) / 2
)

#ok doing the same to N
s23_n <- seed_mort_y1_s23[, c("s23_n_mg_kg_3_20", "s23_n_mg_kg_4_14", "s23_n_mg_kg_5_9")]
s23_n$auc <- with(s23_n,
                    (25 - 0) * (s23_n_mg_kg_3_20 + s23_n_mg_kg_4_14) / 2 +
                      (50 - 25) * (s23_n_mg_kg_4_14 + s23_n_mg_kg_5_9) / 2
)
s23_no3 <- seed_mort_y1_s23[, c("s23_no3_3_20", "s23_no3_4_14", "s23_no3_5_9")]
s23_no3$auc <- with(s23_no3,
                  (25 - 0) * (s23_no3_3_20 + s23_no3_4_14) / 2 +
                    (50 - 25) * (s23_no3_4_14 + s23_no3_5_9) / 2
)
s23_nh4 <- seed_mort_y1_s23[, c("s23_nh4_3_20", "s23_nh4_4_14", "s23_nh4_5_9")]
s23_nh4$auc <- with(s23_nh4,
                  (25 - 0) * (s23_nh4_3_20 + s23_nh4_4_14) / 2 +
                    (50 - 25) * (s23_nh4_4_14 + s23_nh4_5_9) / 2
)


#for the fall, we have four time points
days <- c(0,14,30,41) #days apart from each sampling event
f23_gwc <- seed_mort_y1_f23[, c("f23_gwc_6_6", "f23_gwc_6_20", "f23_gwc_7_6", "f23_gwc_7_17")]
f23_gwc$auc <- apply(f23_gwc, 1, function(y) {
  sum(diff(days) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2)
})

f23_n <- seed_mort_y1_f23[, c("f23_n_mg_kg_6_6", "f23_n_mg_kg_6_20", "f23_n_mg_kg_7_6", "f23_n_mg_kg_7_17")]
f23_n$auc_n <- apply(f23_n, 1, function(y) {
  sum(diff(days) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2)
})

f23_no3 <- seed_mort_y1_f23[, c("f23_no3_6_6", "f23_no3_6_20", "f23_no3_7_6", "f23_no3_7_17")]
f23_no3$auc_no3 <- apply(f23_no3, 1, function(y) {
  sum(diff(days) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2)
})

f23_nh4 <- seed_mort_y1_f23[, c("f23_nh4_6_6", "f23_nh4_6_20", "f23_nh4_7_6", "f23_nh4_7_17")]
f23_nh4$auc_nh4 <- apply(f23_nh4, 1, function(y) {
  sum(diff(days) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2)
})


#now we need to add the auc_s23_gwc and the auc_f23_gwc to the correct data frames 
seed_mort_y1_s23$auc_gwc_s23 <- s23_gwc$auc 
seed_mort_y1_f23$auc_gwc_f23 <- f23_gwc$auc
seed_mort_y1_f23$auc_gwc_s23 <- s23_gwc$auc

seed_mort_y1_s23$auc_n_s23 <- s23_n$auc 
seed_mort_y1_s23$auc_no3_s23 <- s23_no3$auc
seed_mort_y1_s23$auc_nh4_s23 <- s23_nh4$auc
seed_mort_y1_f23$auc_n_s23 <- s23_n$auc
seed_mort_y1_f23$auc_no3_s23 <- s23_no3$auc
seed_mort_y1_f23$auc_nh4_s23 <- s23_nh4$auc
seed_mort_y1_f23$auc_n_f23 <- f23_n$auc_n
seed_mort_y1_f23$auc_no3_f23 <- f23_no3$auc_no3
seed_mort_y1_f23$auc_nh4_f23 <- f23_nh4$auc_nh4

#year two 
days <- c(0,56) #days apart from each sampling event
s24_gwc <- seed_mort_y2_s24[, c("s24_gwc_3_25", "s24_gwc_5_20")]
s24_gwc$auc <- apply(s24_gwc, 1, function(y) {
  sum(diff(days) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2)
})

s24_n <- seed_mort_y2_s24[, c("s24_mgN_kg_3_25", "s24_mgN_kg_5_20")]
s24_n$auc_n <- apply(s24_gwc, 1, function(y) {
  sum(diff(days) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2)
})

s24_nh4 <- seed_mort_y2_s24[, c("s24_nh4_3_25", "s24_nh4_5_20")]
s24_nh4$auc_nh4 <- apply(s24_gwc, 1, function(y) {
  sum(diff(days) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2)
})

s24_no3 <- seed_mort_y2_s24[, c("s24_no3_3_25", "s24_no3_5_20")]
s24_no3$auc_no3 <- apply(s24_gwc, 1, function(y) {
  sum(diff(days) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2)
})
#fall
fall_days <- c(0, 15, 29)
f24_gwc <- seed_mort_y2_f24[, c("f24_gwc_6_12", "f24_gwc_6_27", "f24_gwc_7_11")]
f24_gwc$auc <- apply(f24_gwc, 1, function(y) {
  sum(diff(fall_days) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2)
})

f24_n <- seed_mort_y2_f24[, c("f24_mgN_kg_6_12", "f24_mgN_kg_6_27", "f24_mgN_kg_7_11")]
f24_n$auc_n <- apply(f24_n, 1, function(y) {
  sum(diff(fall_days) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2)
})

f24_nh4 <- seed_mort_y2_f24[, c("f24_nh4_6_12", "f24_nh4_6_27", "f24_nh4_7_11")]
f24_nh4$auc_nh4 <- apply(f24_nh4, 1, function(y) {
  sum(diff(fall_days) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2)
})

f24_no3 <- seed_mort_y2_f24[, c("f24_no3_6_12", "f24_no3_6_27", "f24_no3_7_11")]
f24_no3$auc_no3 <- apply(f24_no3, 1, function(y) {
  sum(diff(fall_days) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2)
})

#now we need to add the AUCs to the data frame 
seed_mort_y2_s24$auc_gwc_s24 <- s24_gwc$auc
seed_mort_y2_f24$auc_gwc_f24 <- f24_gwc$auc

seed_mort_y2_s24$auc_n_s24 <- s24_n$auc_n
seed_mort_y2_f24$auc_n_f24 <- f24_n$auc_n
seed_mort_y2_s24$auc_nh4_s24 <- s24_nh4$auc_nh4
seed_mort_y2_f24$auc_nh4_f24 <- f24_nh4$auc_nh4
seed_mort_y2_s24$auc_no3_s24 <- s24_no3$auc_no3
seed_mort_y2_f24$auc_no3_f24 <- f24_no3$auc_no3
```

ENVIRONMENTAL DATA 
multivariate models by season (using dredge function)
```{r}
#AMAPO SPRING YEAR ONE
form <- amapo_mortality ~ silt + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + f22_gwc_9_29 + auc_gwc_s23 + f22_n + auc_n_s23 
vars <- all.vars(form)
seed_mort_y1_s23.na <- seed_mort_y1_s23[complete.cases(seed_mort_y1_s23[, vars]), ]
big_amapo_s23 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ silt + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + f22_gwc_9_29 + auc_gwc_s23 + f22_n + auc_n_s23, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.fail, data = seed_mort_y1_s23.na)
check_collinearity(big_amapo_s23)
#some evidence of collinearity against CEC and CA but < 5, so acceptable to use in models
#View(dredge(big_amapo_s23))

new_s23_amapo <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ f22_gwc_9_29 + (1|block), family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(new_s23_amapo, type = "III")
summary(new_s23_amapo)
performance(new_s23_amapo)

#AMAPO FALL YEAR ONE
form2 <- amapo_mortality ~ silt + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + auc_gwc_f23 + auc_gwc_s23 + auc_n_s23 + auc_n_f23 
vars2 <- all.vars(form2)
seed_mort_y1_f23.na <- seed_mort_y1_f23[complete.cases(seed_mort_y1_f23[, vars2]), ]
big_amapo_f23 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ silt + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + auc_gwc_f23 + auc_gwc_s23 + auc_n_s23 + auc_n_f23, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.fail, data = seed_mort_y1_f23.na)
check_collinearity(big_amapo_f23)
#View(dredge(big_amapo_f23))

#oh so maybe there is more collinearity than i thought but all < 5
#CA, CEC, GWC in fall, GWC in spring

new_f23_amapo <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ silt, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(new_f23_amapo, type = "III")
summary(new_f23_amapo)
performance(new_f23_amapo)


#SETFA SPRING YEAR ONE
form3 <- setfa_mortality ~ silt + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + f22_gwc_9_29 + auc_gwc_s23 + f22_n + auc_n_s23 
vars3 <- all.vars(form3)
seed_mort_y1_s23.na <- seed_mort_y1_s23[complete.cases(seed_mort_y1_s23[, vars3]), ]
big_setfa_s23 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ silt + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + f22_gwc_9_29 + auc_gwc_s23 + f22_n + auc_n_s23, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.fail, data = seed_mort_y1_s23.na)
#View(dredge(big_setfa_s23))
check_collinearity(big_setfa_s23)
#Ca and CEC

new_s23_setfa <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ auc_gwc_s23 + f22_n + ca_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_s23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(new_s23_setfa, type = "III")
summary(new_s23_setfa)
performance(new_s23_setfa)

#SETFA FALL YEAR ONE 
form4 <- setfa_mortality ~ silt + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + auc_gwc_f23 + auc_gwc_s23 + auc_n_s23 + auc_n_f23 
vars4 <- all.vars(form4)
seed_mort_y1_f23.na <- seed_mort_y1_f23[complete.cases(seed_mort_y1_f23[, vars4]), ]
big_setfa_f23 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ silt + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + auc_gwc_f23 + auc_gwc_s23 + auc_n_s23 + auc_n_f23, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.fail, data = seed_mort_y1_f23.na)
check_collinearity(big_setfa_f23)
#View(dredge(big_setfa_f23))
new_f23_setfa <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ k_ppm + auc_n_f23 + ca_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(new_f23_setfa, type = "III")
summary(new_f23_setfa)
performance(new_f23_setfa)

#check model assumptions YEAR ONE
output_setfa_s23 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = new_s23_setfa)
plot(output_setfa_s23)
testDispersion(output_setfa_s23)
output_amapo_s23 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = new_s23_amapo)
plot(output_amapo_s23)
testDispersion(output_amapo_s23)
output_setfa_f23 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = new_f23_setfa)
plot(output_setfa_f23)
testDispersion(output_setfa_f23) 
output_amapo_f23 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = new_f23_amapo)
plot(output_amapo_f23)
testDispersion(output_amapo_f23)

#YEAR TWO 
#amapo spring
seed_mort_y2_s24[4, "auc_gwc_s24"] <- NA #removing outlier
form5 <- amapo_mortality ~ clay + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + f23_gwc_10_3 + auc_gwc_s24 + f23_n + auc_n_s24 
vars5 <- all.vars(form5)
seed_mort_y2_s24.na <- seed_mort_y2_s24[complete.cases(seed_mort_y2_s24[, vars5]), ]
big_amapo_s24 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ clay + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + f23_gwc_10_3 + auc_gwc_s24 + f23_n + auc_n_s24, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.fail, data = seed_mort_y2_s24.na)
#View(dredge(big_amapo_s24))
new_amapo_s24 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ ca_ppm + cec, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, REML = TRUE, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(new_amapo_s24, type = "III")
summary(new_amapo_s24)
performance(new_amapo_s24)

#amapo fall
form6 <- amapo_mortality ~ clay + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + auc_gwc_f24 + auc_n_f24 
vars6 <- all.vars(form6)
seed_mort_y2_f24.na <- seed_mort_y2_f24[complete.cases(seed_mort_y2_f24[, vars6]), ]
big_amapo_f24 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ clay + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + auc_gwc_f24 + auc_n_f24, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.fail, data = seed_mort_y2_f24.na)
#View(dredge(big_amapo_f24))
new_amapo_f24 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ clay + cec, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(new_amapo_f24, type = "III")
summary(new_amapo_f24)
performance(new_amapo_f24)

#setfa spring
form7 <- setfa_mortality ~ clay + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + f23_gwc_10_3 + auc_gwc_s24 + f23_n + auc_n_s24 
vars7 <- all.vars(form7)
seed_mort_y2_s24.na <- seed_mort_y2_s24[complete.cases(seed_mort_y2_s24[, vars7]), ]
big_setfa_s24 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ clay + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + f23_gwc_10_3 + auc_gwc_s24 + f23_n + auc_n_s24, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.fail, data = seed_mort_y2_s24.na)
#View(dredge(big_setfa_s24))
new_setfa_s24 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ clay, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_s24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(new_setfa_s24, type = "III")
summary(new_setfa_s24)
performance(new_setfa_s24)

#setfa fall 
form8 <- setfa_mortality ~ clay + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + auc_gwc_f24 + auc_n_f24 
vars8 <- all.vars(form8)
seed_mort_y2_f24.na <- seed_mort_y2_f24[complete.cases(seed_mort_y2_f24[, vars8]), ]
big_setfa_f24 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ clay + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + auc_gwc_f24 + auc_n_f24, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.fail, data = seed_mort_y2_f24.na)
#View(dredge(big_setfa_f24))
new_setfa_f24 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ mg_ppm + ca_ppm + clay, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(new_setfa_f24, type = "III")
summary(new_setfa_f24)
performance(new_setfa_f24)

#check year two assumptions 
output_setfa_s24 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = new_setfa_s24)
plot(output_setfa_s24)
testDispersion(output_setfa_s24)
output_amapo_s24 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = new_amapo_s24)
plot(output_amapo_s24)
testDispersion(output_amapo_s24)
output_setfa_f24 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = new_setfa_f24)
plot(output_setfa_f24)
testDispersion(output_setfa_f24) 
output_amapo_f24 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = new_amapo_f24)
plot(output_amapo_f24)
testDispersion(output_amapo_f24)
```

Make spring data from both years into a dataframe, with gwc and n having the same name 
```{r}
seed_mort_y1_s23$spring_gwc <- seed_mort_y1_s23$auc_gwc_s23
seed_mort_y2_s24$spring_gwc <- seed_mort_y2_s24$auc_gwc_s24
seed_mort_y1_s23$burial_gwc <- seed_mort_y1_s23$f22_gwc_9_29
seed_mort_y2_s24$burial_gwc <- seed_mort_y2_s24$f23_gwc_10_3
seed_mort_y1_s23$spring_n <- seed_mort_y1_s23$auc_n_s23
seed_mort_y2_s24$spring_n <- seed_mort_y2_s24$auc_n_s24
seed_mort_y1_s23$burial_n <- seed_mort_y1_s23$f22_n
seed_mort_y2_s24$burial_n <- seed_mort_y2_s24$f23_n
seed_mort_spring2 <- bind_rows(seed_mort_y1_s23, seed_mort_y2_s24)
```

univariate models for spring mortality with year interaction 
```{r}
#what variables are we going to use? 
#clay (or silt) + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + burial_gwc + spring_gwc + burial_n + spring_n
#AMAPO
spring_amapo_clay <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ clay*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_clay, type = "III")
#summary(spring_amapo_clay)
spring_amapo_clay2 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ clay + season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_clay2, type = "III")
summary(spring_amapo_clay2)

spring_amapo_silt <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ silt*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_silt, type = "III")
#summary(spring_amapo_silt)
spring_amapo_silt2 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ silt + season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
AICc(spring_amapo_silt, spring_amapo_silt2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_silt2, type = "III")
summary(spring_amapo_silt2)

spring_amapo_k <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ k_ppm*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_k, type = "III")
#summary(spring_amapo_k)
spring_amapo_k2 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ k_ppm + season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_k2, type = "III")
summary(spring_amapo_k2)
AICc(spring_amapo_k, spring_amapo_k2)

spring_amapo_ca <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ ca_ppm*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_ca, type = "III")
#summary(spring_amapo_ca)
spring_amapo_ca2 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ ca_ppm + season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_ca2, type = "III")
summary(spring_amapo_ca2)
AICc(spring_amapo_ca,spring_amapo_ca2)

spring_amapo_mg <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ mg_ppm*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_mg, type = "III")
#summary(spring_amapo_mg)
spring_amapo_mg2 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ mg_ppm + season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_mg2, type = "III")
summary(spring_amapo_mg2)
AICc(spring_amapo_mg, spring_amapo_mg2)

spring_amapo_cec <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ cec*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_cec, type = "III")
summary(spring_amapo_cec)
#significant interaction 
spring_amapo_cec2 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ cec+season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_cec2, type = "III")
#summary(spring_amapo_cec2)
AICc(spring_amapo_cec, spring_amapo_cec2)

#EMTRENDS
mt <- emtrends(spring_amapo_cec, ~ season, var = "cec")
mt

spring_amapo_bgwc <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ burial_gwc*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_bgwc, type = "III")
#summary(spring_amapo_bgwc)
spring_amapo_bgwc2 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ burial_gwc + season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_bgwc2, type = "III")
summary(spring_amapo_bgwc2)
AICc(spring_amapo_bgwc, spring_amapo_bgwc2)

spring_amapo_bn <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ burial_n*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_bn, type = "III")
#summary(spring_amapo_bn)
spring_amapo_bn2 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ burial_n + season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_bn2, type = "III")
summary(spring_amapo_bn2)
AICc(spring_amapo_bn, spring_amapo_bn2)

spring_amapo_sgwc <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ spring_gwc*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_sgwc, type = "III")
#summary(spring_amapo_sgwc)
spring_amapo_sgwc2 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ spring_gwc + season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_sgwc2, type = "III")
summary(spring_amapo_sgwc2)
AICc(spring_amapo_sgwc, spring_amapo_sgwc2)

spring_amapo_sn <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ spring_n*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_sn, type = "III")
#summary(spring_amapo_sn)
spring_amapo_sn2 <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ spring_n+season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_amapo_sn2, type = "III")
summary(spring_amapo_sn2)
AICc(spring_amapo_sn, spring_amapo_sn2)

#SETFA
spring_setfa_clay <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ clay*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_clay, type = "III")
#summary(spring_setfa_clay)
spring_setfa_clay2 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ clay+season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_clay2, type = "III")
summary(spring_setfa_clay2)
AICc(spring_setfa_clay, spring_setfa_clay2)

spring_setfa_silt <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ silt*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_silt, type = "III")
#summary(spring_setfa_silt)
spring_setfa_silt2 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ silt+season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_silt2, type = "III")
summary(spring_setfa_silt2)
AICc(spring_setfa_silt, spring_setfa_silt2)

spring_setfa_k <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ k_ppm*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_k, type = "III")
#summary(spring_setfa_k)
spring_setfa_k2 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ k_ppm+season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_k2, type = "III")
summary(spring_setfa_k2)
AICc(spring_setfa_k, spring_setfa_k2)

spring_setfa_ca <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ ca_ppm*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_ca, type = "III")
#summary(spring_setfa_ca)
spring_setfa_ca2 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ ca_ppm+season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_ca2, type = "III")
summary(spring_setfa_ca2)
AICc(spring_setfa_ca, spring_setfa_ca2)

spring_setfa_mg <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ mg_ppm*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_mg, type = "III")
#summary(spring_setfa_mg)
spring_setfa_mg2 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ mg_ppm+season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_mg2, type = "III")
summary(spring_setfa_mg2)
AICc(spring_setfa_mg, spring_setfa_mg2)

spring_setfa_cec <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ cec*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_cec, type = "III")
summary(spring_setfa_cec)
spring_setfa_cec2 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ cec+season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_cec2, type = "III")
#summary(spring_setfa_cec2)
#AICc(spring_setfa_cec, spring_setfa_cec2)

spring_setfa_bgwc <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ burial_gwc*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_bgwc, type = "III")
#summary(spring_setfa_bgwc)
spring_setfa_bgwc2 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ burial_gwc+season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_bgwc2, type = "III")
summary(spring_setfa_bgwc2)
AICc(spring_setfa_bgwc, spring_setfa_bgwc2)

spring_setfa_bn <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ burial_n*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_bn, type = "III")
summary(spring_setfa_bn)
spring_setfa_bn2 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ burial_n+season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_bn2, type = "III")
#summary(spring_setfa_bn2)
AICc(spring_setfa_bn, spring_setfa_bn2)

spring_setfa_sgwc <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ spring_gwc*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_sgwc, type = "III")
#summary(spring_setfa_sgwc)
spring_setfa_sgwc2 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ spring_gwc+season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_sgwc2, type = "III")
summary(spring_setfa_sgwc2)
AICc(spring_setfa_sgwc, spring_setfa_sgwc2)

spring_setfa_sn <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ spring_n*season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
#glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_sn, type = "III")
#summary(spring_setfa_sn)
spring_setfa_sn2 <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ spring_n+season, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_spring2)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(spring_setfa_sn2, type = "III")
summary(spring_setfa_sn2)
AICc(spring_setfa_sn, spring_setfa_sn2)
```
univariate models for fall 
```{r}
#variables for year one: clay + silt + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + auc_gwc_f23 + auc_gwc_s23 + auc_n_s23 + auc_n_f23
#variables for year two: clay + silt + k_ppm + mg_ppm + ca_ppm + cec + auc_gwc_f24 + auc_n_f24 

#year one amapo
f23_amapo_clay <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ clay, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_amapo_clay, type = "III")
summary(f23_amapo_clay)

f23_amapo_silt <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ silt, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_amapo_silt, type = "III")
summary(f23_amapo_silt)
#significant

f23_amapo_k <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ k_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_amapo_k, type = "III")
summary(f23_amapo_k)

f23_amapo_ca <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ ca_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_amapo_ca, type = "III")
summary(f23_amapo_ca)
#significant

f23_amapo_mg <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ mg_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_amapo_mg, type = "III")
summary(f23_amapo_mg)
#significant 

f23_amapo_cec <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ cec, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_amapo_cec, type = "III")
summary(f23_amapo_cec)

f23_amapo_fgwc <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ auc_gwc_f23, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_amapo_fgwc, type = "III")
summary(f23_amapo_fgwc)

f23_amapo_sgwc <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ auc_gwc_s23, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_amapo_sgwc, type = "III")
summary(f23_amapo_sgwc)

f23_amapo_sn <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ auc_n_s23, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_amapo_sn, type = "III")
summary(f23_amapo_sn)

f23_amapo_fn <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ auc_n_f23, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_amapo_fn, type = "III")
summary(f23_amapo_fn)

#year one setfa
f23_setfa_clay <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ clay, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_setfa_clay, type = "III")
summary(f23_setfa_clay)

f23_setfa_silt <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ silt, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_setfa_silt, type = "III")
summary(f23_setfa_silt)

f23_setfa_k <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ k_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_setfa_k, type = "III")
summary(f23_setfa_k)
#significant

f23_setfa_ca <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ ca_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_setfa_ca, type = "III")
summary(f23_setfa_ca)

f23_setfa_mg <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ mg_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_setfa_mg, type = "III")
summary(f23_setfa_mg)

f23_setfa_cec <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ cec, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_setfa_cec, type = "III")
summary(f23_setfa_cec)

f23_setfa_fgwc <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ auc_gwc_f23, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_setfa_fgwc, type = "III")
summary(f23_setfa_fgwc)

f23_setfa_sgwc <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ auc_gwc_s23, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_setfa_sgwc, type = "III")
summary(f23_setfa_sgwc)

f23_setfa_sn <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ auc_n_s23, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_setfa_sn, type = "III")
summary(f23_setfa_sn)

f23_setfa_fn <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ auc_n_f23, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y1_f23)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f23_setfa_fn, type = "III")
summary(f23_setfa_fn)

#year two amapo
f24_amapo_clay <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ clay, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_amapo_clay, type = "III")
summary(f24_amapo_clay)
#significant

f24_amapo_silt <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ silt, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_amapo_silt, type = "III")
summary(f24_amapo_silt)

f24_amapo_k <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ k_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_amapo_k, type = "III")
summary(f24_amapo_k)

f24_amapo_ca <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ ca_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_amapo_ca, type = "III")
summary(f24_amapo_ca)

f24_amapo_mg <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ mg_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_amapo_mg, type = "III")
summary(f24_amapo_mg)

f24_amapo_cec <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ cec, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_amapo_cec, type = "III")
summary(f24_amapo_cec)
#significant

f24_amapo_fgwc <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ auc_gwc_f24, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_amapo_fgwc, type = "III")
summary(f24_amapo_fgwc)

f24_amapo_fn <- glmmTMB(amapo_mortality ~ auc_n_f24, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_amapo_fn, type = "III")
summary(f24_amapo_fn)

#year two setfa
f24_setfa_clay <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ clay, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_setfa_clay, type = "III")
summary(f24_setfa_clay)
#significant

f24_setfa_silt <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ silt, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_setfa_silt, type = "III")
summary(f24_setfa_silt)
#significant

f24_setfa_k <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ k_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_setfa_k, type = "III")
summary(f24_setfa_k)

f24_setfa_ca <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ ca_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_setfa_ca, type = "III")
summary(f24_setfa_ca)
#significant

f24_setfa_mg <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ mg_ppm, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_setfa_mg, type = "III")
summary(f24_setfa_mg)
#significant 

f24_setfa_cec <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ cec, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_setfa_cec, type = "III")
summary(f24_setfa_cec)

f24_setfa_fgwc <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ auc_gwc_f24, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_setfa_fgwc, type = "III")
summary(f24_setfa_fgwc)

f24_setfa_fn <- glmmTMB(setfa_mortality ~ auc_n_f24, family = beta_family(), na.action = na.omit, data = seed_mort_y2_f24)
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(f24_setfa_fn, type = "III")
summary(f24_setfa_fn)
```
 
Creating 16S phyloseq object 
```{r}
library(phyloseq)
library(Biostrings)
#make ASV table
asv_table_16s <- read.table("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/16s/feature-table.tsv",
                        header = TRUE,
                        sep = "\t",
                        row.names = 1,
                        comment.char = "",
                        skip = 1,#skip first line (info ab variables that we don't need)
                        check.names = FALSE)
colnames(asv_table_16s)[1] <- "FeatureID"


#convert to matrix
asv_matrix_16s <- as.matrix(asv_table_16s)
rep_seqs_16s <- readDNAStringSet("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/16s/rep-seqs.fasta")
names(rep_seqs_16s) <- names(rep_seqs_16s)

tax_16s <- read.table("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/16s/taxonomy.tsv",
                  header = TRUE,
                  sep = "\t",
                  row.names = 1,
                  quote = "",
                  comment.char = "",
                  check.names = FALSE)

tax_split_16s <- strsplit(as.character(tax_16s$Taxon), ";")

tax_mat_16s <- do.call(rbind, lapply(tax_split_16s, function(x) {
  length(x) <- 7  #7 levels
  return(x)
}))

colnames(tax_mat_16s) <- c("Kingdom","Phylum","Class","Order","Family","Genus","Species")
rownames(tax_mat_16s) <- rownames(tax_16s)
otu_16s <- otu_table(asv_matrix_16s, taxa_are_rows = TRUE)
tax_table_ps_16s <- tax_table(as.matrix(tax_mat_16s))

#add metadata
metadata_16s <- read.table("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/16s/sample_metadata.txt", header = TRUE, sep = "\t", row.names = 1, na.strings = "NA")
ps_16s <- phyloseq(otu_16s, tax_table_ps_16s, sample_data(metadata_16s), refseq(rep_seqs_16s))

#filter out reads that are only in one sapmle and <20 reads
ps_16s <- prune_taxa(
  rowSums(otu_table(ps_16s) > 0) >= 2 & taxa_sums(ps_16s) >= 20,
  ps_16s
)

#take out contamination from eukaryotes (specifically, mitochondria from chloroplasts)
#ps <- subset_taxa(ps, Kingdom == " k__Bacteria" | is.na(Phylum))
ps_16s <- subset_taxa(ps_16s, (Family != " f__Mitochondria") | is.na(Family))
ntaxa(ps_16s) #1654

#save phyloseq object 
saveRDS(ps_16s, file = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/16s/phyloseq_16s.rds")
```

Creating ITS phyloseq object 
```{r}
#make ASV table
asv_table_its <- read.table("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/its/feature-table.tsv",
                        header = TRUE,
                        sep = "\t",
                        row.names = 1,
                        comment.char = "",
                        skip = 1,#skip first line (info ab variables that we don't need)
                        check.names = FALSE)
colnames(asv_table_its)[1] <- "FeatureID"


#convert to matrix
asv_matrix_its <- as.matrix(asv_table_its)
rep_seqs_its <- readDNAStringSet("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/its/rep-seqs.fasta")
names(rep_seqs_its) <- names(rep_seqs_its)

tax_its <- read.table("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/its/taxonomy.tsv",
                  header = TRUE,
                  sep = "\t",
                  row.names = 1,
                  quote = "",
                  comment.char = "",
                  check.names = FALSE)

tax_split_its <- strsplit(as.character(tax_its$Taxon), ";")

tax_mat_its <- do.call(rbind, lapply(tax_split_its, function(x) {
  length(x) <- 7  #7 levels
  return(x)
}))

colnames(tax_mat_its) <- c("Kingdom","Phylum","Class","Order","Family","Genus","Species")
rownames(tax_mat_its) <- rownames(tax_its)
otu_its <- otu_table(asv_matrix_its, taxa_are_rows = TRUE)
tax_table_ps_its <- tax_table(as.matrix(tax_mat_its))

#add metadata
metadata_its <- read.table("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/its/sample_metadata.txt", header = TRUE, sep = "\t", row.names = 1, na.strings = "NA")
ps_its <- phyloseq(otu_its, tax_table_ps_its, sample_data(metadata_its), refseq(rep_seqs_its))

#filter out reads that are only in one sapmle and <20 reads
ps_its <- prune_taxa(
  rowSums(otu_table(ps_its) > 0) >= 2 & taxa_sums(ps_its) >= 20,
  ps_its
)

ntaxa(ps_its) #361

#save phyloseq object 
saveRDS(ps_its, file = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/its/phyloseq_its.rds")
```
16S ANALYSES + PLOTS
```{r}
ps_16s <- readRDS("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/16s/phyloseq_16s.rds")
#PLOTS
ps_16s <- subset_taxa(ps_16s, (Kingdom != "Unassigned"))
ps_16s <- subset_taxa(ps_16s, (Kingdom != "d__Archaea"))
```
rarefaction (16s)
```{r rarefaction curves, warning=FALSE}
otu_16s <- as(otu_table(ps_16s), "matrix")
#see if samples are rows
if (taxa_are_rows(ps_16s)) {
  otu_16s <- t(otu_16s)
}

#make rarefaction curves
rare_list_16s <- lapply(1:nrow(otu_16s), function(i) {
  x <- otu_16s[i, ]
  depths <- seq(1, sum(x), length.out = 50)  #smoother curves
  
  richness_16s <- sapply(depths, function(d) {
    vegan::rarefy(x, sample = d)
  })
  
  data.frame(
    Sample = rownames(otu_16s)[i],
    Depth = depths,
    Richness = richness_16s
  )
})

rare_df_16s <- bind_rows(rare_list_16s)

#add metadata
meta_16s <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_16s))
meta_16s$Sample <- rownames(meta_16s)
rare_df_16s <- left_join(rare_df_16s, meta_16s, by = "Sample")

#make plot
rarefaction_16s <- ggplot(rare_df_16s, aes(x = Depth, y = Richness, group = Sample)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.8) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 20) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+
  labs(
    x = "Sequencing Depth",
    y = "Observed ASVs") +
  scale_x_continuous(n.breaks = 6) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("16s_rarefaction.png", plot = rarefaction_16s, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
rarefying (16s)
```{r rarefying to minimum}
#rarefy
#find lowest sample size 
sample.size_16s = min(sample_sums(ps_16s)) #73325
sample.size_16s

set.seed(123)
ps_16s <- rarefy_even_depth(ps_16s, sample.size_16s,
                              rngseed = 123,
                              replace = TRUE,
                              trimOTUs = TRUE,
                              verbose = TRUE)
```
alpha diversity (16s)
```{r}
ps_filtered_16s <- subset_samples(ps_16s, trt != "baseline")
alpha_div_16s <- estimate_richness(ps_filtered_16s, measures = c("Observed", "Shannon", "Simpson"))

#add sample IDs to alpha div dataframe  
alpha_div_16s$SampleID <- rownames(alpha_div_16s)
alpha_div_16s <- merge(alpha_div_16s, data.frame(sample_data(ps_filtered_16s)), 
                   by.x = "SampleID", by.y = "row.names")

#reformat for ggplot
alpha_long_16s <- alpha_div_16s %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("Observed", "Shannon", "Simpson"),
               names_to = "Metric",
               values_to = "Value")
               
#get mean + std error for bar chart
alpha_summary_16s <- alpha_long_16s %>%
  group_by(season, trt, Metric) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Value),
    se = sd(Value) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

#new graphs for alpha div 
obs_dat_16s <- filter(alpha_long_16s, Metric == "Observed")
shan_dat_16s <- filter(alpha_long_16s, Metric == "Shannon")
simp_dat_16s <- filter(alpha_long_16s, Metric == "Simpson")

my_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

p_obs_16s <- ggplot(obs_dat_16s, aes(x = season, y = Value, fill = trt)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean,geom = "bar", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),width = 0.2) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.15, dodge.width = 0.8), color = "black",alpha = 1,size = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("S23", "F23"), labels = c("growth", "decomposition")) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    x = "Cover crop phase",
    y = "Observed richness",
    fill = "Treatment")+ 
  my_theme
p_obs_16s
p_shan_16s <- ggplot(shan_dat_16s, aes(x = season, y = Value, fill = trt)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean,geom = "bar", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),width = 0.2) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.15, dodge.width = 0.8), color = "black",alpha = 1,size = 1,show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("S23", "F23"), labels = c("growth", "decomposition")) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    x = "Cover crop phase",
    y = "Shannon diversity",
    fill = "Treatment")+ 
  my_theme
p_shan_16s

p_simp_16s <- ggplot(simp_dat_16s, aes(x = season, y = Value, fill = trt)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean,geom = "bar", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),width = 0.2) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.15, dodge.width = 0.8), color = "black",alpha = 1,size = 1,show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("S23", "F23"), labels = c("growth", "decomposition")) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    x = "Cover crop phase",
    y = "Simpson diversity",
    fill = "Treatment")+ 
  my_theme
p_simp_16s

library(patchwork)
combined_plot_16s <- (p_obs_16s | p_shan_16s | p_simp_16s) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

combined_plot_16s

ggsave("16s_alpha_div.png", plot = combined_plot_16s, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
taxonomic bar plots (16s)
```{r taxonomic bar plots}
#TAXONOMIC BAR PLOTS
ps_glom_16s <- tax_glom(ps_filtered_16s, taxrank = "Family") #can change for any taxonomic group
ps_rel_16s <- transform_sample_counts(ps_glom_16s, function(x) x / sum(x))
sample_sums(ps_rel_16s)
top_taxa_16s <- names(sort(taxa_sums(ps_rel_16s), decreasing = TRUE))[1:10]
ps_top_16s <- prune_taxa(top_taxa_16s, ps_rel_16s)
ps_top_16s <- transform_sample_counts(ps_top_16s, function(x) x / sum(x))
df_16s <- psmelt(ps_top_16s)
#replace NA
df_16s$Family[is.na(df_16s$Family)] <- "Unknown"
find("recode")
library(dplyr)

df_16s <- df_16s %>%
  mutate(phase = dplyr::recode(season,"S23" = "growth","F23" = "decomposition"),
    phase = factor(phase,
                          levels = c("growth", "decomposition")),
    x_label = paste(trt, phase)
  ) %>%
  arrange(phase, trt, Sample)

df_16s$Sample <- factor(df_16s$Sample, levels = unique(df_16s$Sample))
label_vec_16s <- setNames(df_16s$x_label, df_16s$Sample)

family_taxa_16s <- ggplot(df_16s, aes(x = Sample, y = Abundance, fill = Family)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = label_vec_16s) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    y = "Relative Abundance",
    x = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)
  )
family_taxa_16s
  
ggsave("16S_taxa_family.png", plot = family_taxa_16s, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
beta diversity + plots (16s)
```{r beta diversity}
#BETA DIV
bray_dist_16s <- phyloseq::distance(ps_16s, method = "bray")
pcoa_res_16s <- ordinate(ps_16s, method = "PCoA", distance = bray_dist_16s)

#plot by treatment and szn
pcoa_plot_16s <- plot_ordination(ps_16s, pcoa_res_16s, type = "samples", color = "season", shape= "trt") +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 14)) +
  labs(color = "Treatment") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2",
                     labels = c("Baseline",
                                "CC decomposition",
                                "CC growth"))

eig_16s <- pcoa_res_16s$values$Eigenvalues
var_exp_16s <- eig_16s / sum(eig_16s)

pcoa_plot_16s <- pcoa_plot_16s +
  labs(
    x = paste0("PCoA1 (", round(100 * var_exp_16s[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PCoA2 (", round(100 * var_exp_16s[2], 1), "%)")
  )

pcoa_plot_16s <- pcoa_plot_16s + 
  stat_ellipse(aes(group = season), type = "t", level = 0.95)

ggsave("16s_pcoa.png", plot = pcoa_plot_16s,
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
dbRDA (16s)
```{r distance based rda}
#DISTANCE BASED RDA
otu_mat_16s <- as(otu_table(ps_filtered_16s), "matrix")
if(taxa_are_rows(ps_filtered_16s)) {
  otu_mat_16s <- t(otu_mat_16s)
}

meta_16s <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_filtered_16s))

#isolate numeric environmental variables
library(dplyr)
env_vars_16s <- meta_16s %>%
  dplyr::select(sand, silt, clay, k_ppm, ca_ppm, mg_ppm, cec, burial_moisture, incubation_moisture, burial_n, incubation_n)

bray_dist_16s <- vegdist(otu_mat_16s, method = "bray")


dbrda_res_16s <- capscale(bray_dist_16s ~ ., data = env_vars_16s)
anova(dbrda_res_16s, permutations = 999)
anova(dbrda_res_16s, by = "terms", permutations = 999)

#PLOTTING
library(ggrepel)
site_scores_16s <- as.data.frame(scores(dbrda_res_16s, display = "sites"))
env_scores_16s <- as.data.frame(scores(dbrda_res_16s, display = "bp"))
site_scores_16s <- cbind(site_scores_16s, meta_16s)

colnames(meta_16s)
site_scores_16s$season <- as.factor(site_scores_16s$season)
site_scores_16s$trt <- as.factor(site_scores_16s$trt)

env_scores_16s <- as.data.frame(env_scores_16s)
env_scores_16s$CAP1 <- as.numeric(env_scores_16s$CAP1)
env_scores_16s$CAP2 <- as.numeric(env_scores_16s$CAP2)
str(env_scores_16s)

eig_16s <- dbrda_res_16s$CCA$eig
var_exp_16s <- eig_16s / sum(eig_16s)
cap1_16s <- round(100 * var_exp_16s[1], 1)
cap2_16s <- round(100 * var_exp_16s[2], 1)

dbRDA_plot_16s <- ggplot(site_scores_16s, aes(x = CAP1, y = CAP2, color = season, shape = trt)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(data = env_scores_16s,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = CAP1, yend = CAP2),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3,"cm")), color = "black") +
  geom_text_repel(data = env_scores_16s,
                  aes(x = CAP1, y = CAP2, label = rownames(env_scores_16s)),
                  inherit.aes = FALSE,
                  size = 5) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") + 
  scale_color_discrete(
    name = "Cover crop phase",
    labels = c("Decomposition", "Growth")
  ) +
  scale_shape_discrete(
    name = "Treatment",
    labels = c("Canola", "Fallow")
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 20) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("CAP1 (", cap1_16s, "%)"),
    y = paste0("CAP2 (", cap2_16s, "%)") , color = "Cover crop phase", shape = "Treatment")

ggsave("16s_dbrda.png", plot = dbRDA_plot_16s, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

#clay and N collinear, so one is excluded
```
16s statistical analyses
```{r statistics}
#STATISTICS 
ps_alpha_16s <- subset_samples(ps_16s, trt != "baseline")
ps_alpha_16s <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_alpha_16s) > 0, ps_alpha_16s)

#recalculate alpha diversity
alpha_df_16s <- estimate_richness(ps_alpha_16s, measures = c("Observed", "Shannon", "Simpson"))
meta_alpha_16s <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_alpha_16s))
alpha_df_16s <- cbind(alpha_df_16s, meta_alpha_16s)

#make into factors
alpha_df_16s$trt <- as.factor(alpha_df_16s$trt)
alpha_df_16s$season <- as.factor(alpha_df_16s$season)
library(glmmTMB)

shannon_model_16s <- glmmTMB(Shannon ~ trt * season + (1|block), 
                         data = alpha_df_16s, 
                         family = gaussian())
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(shannon_model_16s, type = "III")



richness_model_16s <- glmmTMB(Observed ~ trt * season + (1|block),
                          data = alpha_df_16s,
                          family = nbinom2())
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(richness_model_16s, type = "III")
                          
simpson_model_16s <- glmmTMB(Simpson ~ trt * season + (1|block),
                          data = alpha_df_16s,
                          family = nbinom2())

glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(simpson_model_16s, type = "III")
summary(shannon_model_16s)
library(emmeans)
emmeans_shannon_16s <- emmeans(shannon_model_16s, ~ season)
emmeans_shannon_16s

summary(richness_model_16s)
emmeans_richness_16s <- emmeans(richness_model_16s, ~ season)
emmeans_richness_16s

library(ggpubr)
div_16s_mort <- ggplot(data = alpha_df_16s, aes(x = Shannon, y = setfa_mortality)) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  geom_point() + 
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black") +
  stat_cor(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., ..p.label.., sep = "~`,`~")), label.y = 1) +
  labs(x = "Bacterial Shannon diversity", 
       y = "S. faberi seed mortality") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 20) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18)
  )

ggsave("div_16s_mort.png", plot = div_16s_mort, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

#stats on beta
ps_beta_16s <- subset_samples(ps_16s, trt != "baseline")
ps_beta_16s <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_beta_16s) > 0, ps_beta_16s)

otu_mat_16s <- as(otu_table(ps_beta_16s), "matrix")
if(taxa_are_rows(ps_beta_16s)) {
  otu_mat_16s <- t(otu_mat_16s)  # samples as rows
}

meta_16s <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_beta_16s))

bray_dist_16s <- vegdist(otu_mat_16s, method = "bray")

set.seed(123)
permanova_res_16s <- adonis2(bray_dist_16s ~ season, data = meta_16s, permutations = 999)
permanova_res_16s
#groups centroids different 

betadisp_season_16s <- betadisper(bray_dist_16s, meta_16s$season)
anova(betadisp_season_16s)
#dispersion NOT different
```
ITS analyses and plots 
```{r}
ps_its <- readRDS("/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort/its/phyloseq_its.rds")
```
rarefaction (its)
```{r rarefaction curves, warning=FALSE}
otu_its <- as(otu_table(ps_its), "matrix")
#see if samples are rows
if (taxa_are_rows(ps_its)) {
  otu_its <- t(otu_its)
}

#make rarefaction curves
rare_list_its <- lapply(1:nrow(otu_its), function(i) {
  x <- otu_its[i, ]
  depths <- seq(1, sum(x), length.out = 50)  #smoother curves
  
  richness_its <- sapply(depths, function(d) {
    vegan::rarefy(x, sample = d)
  })
  
  data.frame(
    Sample = rownames(otu_its)[i],
    Depth = depths,
    Richness = richness_its
  )
})

rare_df_its <- bind_rows(rare_list_its)

#add metadata
meta_its <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_its))
```
