```{r rarefaction curves, warning=FALSE}
meta_its$Sample <- rownames(meta_its)
rare_df_its <- left_join(rare_df_its, meta_its, by = "Sample")

#make plot
rarefaction_its <- ggplot(rare_df_its, aes(x = Depth, y = Richness, group = Sample)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.8) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 20) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+
  labs(
    x = "Sequencing Depth",
    y = "Observed ASVs") +
  scale_x_continuous(n.breaks = 6) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("its_rarefaction.png", plot = rarefaction_its, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
rarefying (its)
```{r rarefying to minimum}
#rarefy
#find lowest sample size 
sample.size_its = min(sample_sums(ps_its)) #93141
sample.size_its

set.seed(123)
ps_its <- rarefy_even_depth(ps_its, sample.size_its,
                              rngseed = 123,
                              replace = TRUE,
                              trimOTUs = TRUE,
                              verbose = TRUE)
```
alpha diversity (its)
```{r}
ps_filtered_its <- subset_samples(ps_its, trt != "baseline")
alpha_div_its <- estimate_richness(ps_filtered_its, measures = c("Observed", "Shannon", "Simpson"))

#add sample IDs to alpha div dataframe  
alpha_div_its$SampleID <- rownames(alpha_div_its)
alpha_div_its <- merge(alpha_div_its, data.frame(sample_data(ps_filtered_its)), 
                   by.x = "SampleID", by.y = "row.names")

#reformat for ggplot
alpha_long_its <- alpha_div_its %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("Observed", "Shannon", "Simpson"),
               names_to = "Metric",
               values_to = "Value")
               
#get mean + std error for bar chart
alpha_summary_its <- alpha_long_its %>%
  group_by(season, trt, Metric) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Value),
    se = sd(Value) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

#new graphs for alpha div 
obs_dat_its <- filter(alpha_long_its, Metric == "Observed")
shan_dat_its <- filter(alpha_long_its, Metric == "Shannon")
simp_dat_its <- filter(alpha_long_its, Metric == "Simpson")

p_obs_its <- ggplot(obs_dat_its, aes(x = season, y = Value, fill = trt)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean,geom = "bar", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),width = 0.2) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.15, dodge.width = 0.8), color = "black",alpha = 1,size = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("S23", "F23"), labels = c("growth", "decomposition")) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    x = "Cover crop phase",
    y = "Observed richness",
    fill = "Treatment")+ 
  my_theme
p_obs_its
p_shan_its <- ggplot(shan_dat_its, aes(x = season, y = Value, fill = trt)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean,geom = "bar", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),width = 0.2) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.15, dodge.width = 0.8), color = "black",alpha = 1,size = 1,show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("S23", "F23"), labels = c("growth", "decomposition")) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    x = "Cover crop phase",
    y = "Shannon diversity",
    fill = "Treatment")+ 
  my_theme
p_shan_its

p_simp_its <- ggplot(simp_dat_its, aes(x = season, y = Value, fill = trt)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean,geom = "bar", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),width = 0.2) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.15, dodge.width = 0.8), color = "black",alpha = 1,size = 1,show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("S23", "F23"), labels = c("growth", "decomposition")) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    x = "Cover crop phase",
    y = "Simpson diversity",
    fill = "Treatment")+ 
  my_theme
p_simp_its

library(patchwork)
combined_plot_its <- (p_obs_its | p_shan_its | p_simp_its) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

combined_plot_its

ggsave("its_alpha_div.png", plot = combined_plot_its, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
taxonomic bar plots (its) NOT WORKING AT THE MOMENT BUT MAYBE WILL EVENTUALLY??
```{r taxonomic bar plots}
#TAXONOMIC BAR PLOTS
ps_glom_its <- tax_glom(ps_filtered_its, taxrank = "Family") #can change for any taxonomic group
ps_rel_its <- transform_sample_counts(ps_glom_its, function(x) x / sum(x))
sample_sums(ps_rel_its)
top_taxa_its <- names(sort(taxa_sums(ps_rel_its), decreasing = TRUE))[1:10]
ps_top_its <- prune_taxa(top_taxa_its, ps_rel_its)
ps_top_its <- transform_sample_counts(ps_top_its, function(x) x / sum(x))
df_its <- psmelt(ps_top_its)
#replace NA
df_its$Family[is.na(df_its$Family)] <- "Unknown"
df_its <- df_its %>%
  mutate(phase = dplyr::recode(season,"S23" = "growth","F23" = "decomposition"),
    phase = factor(phase,
                          levels = c("growth", "decomposition")),
    x_label = paste(trt, phase)
  ) %>%
  arrange(phase, trt, Sample)

df_its$Sample <- factor(df_its$Sample, levels = unique(df_its$Sample))
label_vec_its <- setNames(df_its$x_label, df_its$Sample)

family_taxa_its <- ggplot(df_its, aes(x = Sample, y = Abundance, fill = Family)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = label_vec_its) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    y = "Relative Abundance",
    x = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)
  )
family_taxa_its
  
ggsave("its_taxa_family.png", plot = family_taxa_its, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
beta diversity + plots (its)
```{r beta diversity}
#BETA DIV
bray_dist_its <- phyloseq::distance(ps_its, method = "bray")
pcoa_res_its <- ordinate(ps_its, method = "PCoA", distance = bray_dist_its)

#plot by treatment and szn
pcoa_plot_its <- plot_ordination(ps_its, pcoa_res_its, type = "samples", color = "season", shape= "trt") +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 14)) +
  labs(color = "Treatment") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2",
                     labels = c("Baseline",
                                "CC decomposition",
                                "CC growth"))

eig_its <- pcoa_res_its$values$Eigenvalues
var_exp_its <- eig_its / sum(eig_its)

pcoa_plot_its <- pcoa_plot_its +
  labs(
    x = paste0("PCoA1 (", round(100 * var_exp_its[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PCoA2 (", round(100 * var_exp_its[2], 1), "%)")
  )

pcoa_plot_its <- pcoa_plot_its + 
  stat_ellipse(aes(group = season), type = "t", level = 0.95)

ggsave("its_pcoa.png", plot = pcoa_plot_its, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
dbRDA (its)
```{r distance based rda}
#DISTANCE BASED RDA
otu_mat_its <- as(otu_table(ps_filtered_its), "matrix")
if(taxa_are_rows(ps_filtered_its)) {
  otu_mat_its <- t(otu_mat_its)
}

meta_its <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_filtered_its))

#isolate numeric environmental variables
library(dplyr)
env_vars_its <- meta_its %>%
  dplyr::select(sand, silt, clay, k_ppm, ca_ppm, mg_ppm, cec, burial_moisture, incubation_moisture, burial_n, incubation_n)

bray_dist_its <- vegdist(otu_mat_its, method = "bray")


dbrda_res_its <- capscale(bray_dist_its ~ ., data = env_vars_its)
anova(dbrda_res_its, permutations = 999)
anova(dbrda_res_its, by = "terms", permutations = 999)

#PLOTTING
library(ggrepel)
site_scores_its <- as.data.frame(scores(dbrda_res_its, display = "sites"))
env_scores_its <- as.data.frame(scores(dbrda_res_its, display = "bp"))
site_scores_its <- cbind(site_scores_its, meta_its)

colnames(meta_its)
site_scores_its$season <- as.factor(site_scores_its$season)
site_scores_its$trt <- as.factor(site_scores_its$trt)

env_scores_its <- as.data.frame(env_scores_its)
env_scores_its$CAP1 <- as.numeric(env_scores_its$CAP1)
env_scores_its$CAP2 <- as.numeric(env_scores_its$CAP2)
str(env_scores_its)

eig_its <- dbrda_res_its$CCA$eig
var_exp_its <- eig_its / sum(eig_its)
cap1_its <- round(100 * var_exp_its[1], 1)
cap2_its <- round(100 * var_exp_its[2], 1)

dbRDA_plot_its <- ggplot(site_scores_its, aes(x = CAP1, y = CAP2, color = season, shape = trt)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(data = env_scores_its,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = CAP1, yend = CAP2),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3,"cm")), color = "black") +
  geom_text_repel(data = env_scores_its,
                  aes(x = CAP1, y = CAP2, label = rownames(env_scores_its)),
                  inherit.aes = FALSE,
                  size = 5) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") + 
  scale_color_discrete(
    name = "Cover crop phase",
    labels = c("Decomposition", "Growth")
  ) +
  scale_shape_discrete(
    name = "Treatment",
    labels = c("Canola", "Fallow")
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 20) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("CAP1 (", cap1_16s, "%)"),
    y = paste0("CAP2 (", cap2_16s, "%)") , color = "Cover crop phase", shape = "Treatment")

ggsave("its_dbrda.png", plot = dbRDA_plot_its, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

#clay and n at burial collinear
```
its statistical analyses
```{r statistics}
#STATISTICS 
ps_alpha_its <- subset_samples(ps_its, trt != "baseline")
ps_alpha_its <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_alpha_its) > 0, ps_alpha_its)

#recalculate alpha diversity
alpha_df_its <- estimate_richness(ps_alpha_its, measures = c("Observed", "Shannon", "Simpson"))
meta_alpha_its <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_alpha_its))
alpha_df_its <- cbind(alpha_df_its, meta_alpha_its)

#make into factors
alpha_df_its$trt <- as.factor(alpha_df_its$trt)
alpha_df_its$season <- as.factor(alpha_df_its$season)
library(glmmTMB)

shannon_model_its <- glmmTMB(Shannon ~ trt * season + (1|block), 
                         data = alpha_df_its, 
                         family = gaussian())
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(shannon_model_its, type = "III")

richness_model_its <- glmmTMB(Observed ~ trt * season + (1|block),
                          data = alpha_df_its,
                          family = nbinom2())
glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(richness_model_its, type = "III")
                          
simpson_model_its <- glmmTMB(Simpson ~ trt * season + (1|block),
                          data = alpha_df_its,
                          family = nbinom2())

glmmTMB:::Anova.glmmTMB(simpson_model_its, type = "III")
summary(shannon_model_its)
library(emmeans)
emmeans_shannon_its <- emmeans(shannon_model_its, ~ season)
emmeans_shannon_its

summary(richness_model_its)
emmeans_richness_its <- emmeans(richness_model_its, ~ season)
emmeans_richness_its

library(ggpubr)
div_its_mort <- ggplot(data = alpha_df_its, aes(x = Shannon, y = setfa_mortality)) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  geom_point() + 
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black") +
  stat_cor(aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., ..p.label.., sep = "~`,`~")), label.y = 1) +
  labs(x = "Bacterial Shannon diversity", 
       y = "S. faberi seed mortality") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 20) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18)
  )

ggsave("div_its_mort.png", plot = div_its_mort, path = "/Users/mayahofmann/Desktop/data_files_seed_mort",
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

#stats on beta
ps_beta_its <- subset_samples(ps_its, trt != "baseline")
ps_beta_its <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_beta_its) > 0, ps_beta_its)

otu_mat_its <- as(otu_table(ps_beta_its), "matrix")
if(taxa_are_rows(ps_beta_its)) {
  otu_mat_its <- t(otu_mat_its)  # samples as rows
}

meta_its <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_beta_its))

bray_dist_its <- vegdist(otu_mat_its, method = "bray")

set.seed(123)
permanova_res_its <- adonis2(bray_dist_its ~ season, data = meta_its, permutations = 999)
permanova_res_its
#groups centroids different 

betadisp_season_its <- betadisper(bray_dist_its, meta_its$season)
anova(betadisp_season_its)
#dispersion NOT different
```
